layoutRegions.name: sentinel-hero
layoutRegions.purpose: Summarize resumed archive purge sentinel posture and expose the freezeback guard action.

layoutRegions.name: execution-grid
layoutRegions.purpose: Compare resumed purge executions, thaw authorization drift, hold relapse alerts, and owner confirmation replay.

layoutRegions.name: sentinel-panels
layoutRegions.purpose: Inspect retry hash thaw replay, checksum unlock drift, and rollback-safe resume sentinels.

components.name: ExecutionCard
components.purpose: Resumed archive purge execution summary with drift, confirmation replay, and sentinel coverage.
interactions: status chip highlights drift, guarded, or review state
progress bar communicates sentinel coverage without layout shift

components.name: EvidenceRow
components.purpose: Dense row for thaw authorization drift, relapse alerts, resume confirmations, and checksum unlock drift.
interactions: state label remains visible at narrow widths
row content stacks cleanly on mobile

components.name: ResumeSentinel
components.purpose: Rollback-safe command and exhibit checklist for watching and freezing back resumed purge execution.
interactions: packet fields preserve long command text without overlapping neighboring panels
checklist remains readable on mobile and desktop

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
